findings.summary: False pwr_flag_warning on GND: two PWR_FLAG symbols are correctly wired to GND but not recognised
findings.details: pwr_flag_warnings reports that GND has power_in pins but no power_out or PWR_FLAG. However, the schematic contains two PWR_FLAG symbols (#FLG01 and #FLG02), both wired into the GND net.

findings.summary: Footprint mismatch on R3 correctly detected via footprint_filter_warnings
findings.details: R3 (value 33K) has footprint 'Capacitor_SMD:C_1206_3216Metric' - a capacitor footprint on a resistor. The analyzer correctly flags this in footprint_filter_warnings.

findings.summary: No transistor circuit detection for LSK389C dual JFET balanced microphone amplifier
findings.details: signal_analysis.transistor_circuits is empty, but Q1 and Q2 are LSK389C dual N-channel JFETs configured as a balanced XLR microphone amplifier.
